data.title: Huang Licheng's HYPE long position currently has a floating loss of more than $1.8 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Huang Licheng currently has a floating loss of $1.81 million on long HYPE contracts. He bought 200,000 HYPE spot at $29.4 some time ago, and then used the contract to buy 530,000 HYPE with 5 times leverage, with an average opening price of $35.5.
With the callback of HYPE prices in the past two days, his long HYPE contracts have currently lost $1.81 million. However, the 200,000 HYPE he holds in spot still has a profit of $520,000.

data.title: Two early Ethereum whales transferred more than 1,500 ETH to CEX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, two early Ethereum whales transferred 1546.69 ETH to CEX, including: 
-ETH IC0 1 million ETH whale recharged 959.69 ETH to OKX 5 hours ago, worth $2.54 million; there are still 50704 ETH left on the chain, worth $132 million. 
-2015 IC0 100,000 ETH whale recharged 587 ETH to Kraken 3 hours ago, worth $1.56 million; since March 13, 2025, a total of 14398 ETH has been sold, about $28.47 million, with an average price of $1977.

data.title: Fluence (FLT) announces its 2026 vision to accelerate the deployment of AI computing market with RWA tokenization
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Fluence announced its 2026 vision and will launch four new initiatives on June 1, committed to building the world's leading RWA tokenized computing platform.
Initiatives include: Guardian Plan-Establish a global monitoring computing network; Meaningless Plan-Reward community contributions; Token repurchase plan-Establish a deflation mechanism; AI computing function-Add new hardware support such as GPU.
It is reported that Fluence has established an enterprise-level decentralized computing network, operated by global data centers, and the native token FLT is used to guarantee computing resources. The platform has currently generated millions of dollars in annualized revenue for providers, locked more than 25 million FLT, and saved customers more than 4 million US dollars in cloud computing costs.
In addition, Fluence will expand its service scope, enhance computing capabilities, and use the advantages of decentralization to deal with network security threats. By 2026, Fluence plans to deploy a monitoring network globally through guardian nodes to create a safe and reliable computing infrastructure ecosystem.

data.title: Trump and Musk to Hold Press Conference in Oval Office
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that he will hold a press conference with Elon Musk in the Oval Office at 1:30 PM Eastern Time (1:30 AM UTC+8) on Saturday. Trump mentioned that this event marks Musk's last day in his current role, but added that Musk will always remain with them in spirit.

data.title: Pantera Capital Highlights Key Investments in Crypto Firms
data.description: According to Foresight News, Pantera Capital has revealed its strategic investments in a portfolio of publicly traded companies holding crypto assets. In an investor memo, the firm highlighted its primary investment targets, which include Twenty One Capital, a Bitcoin reserve company backed by Tether and SoftBank. Additionally, Pantera is focusing on DeFi Development, which specializes in Solana, and Sharplink Gaming, an Ethereum-holding enterprise supported by ConsenSys.

data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Plans Bitcoin Fund with Gold Hedge
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Wall Street investment bank Cantor Fitzgerald is set to launch a Bitcoin fund hedged with gold. The fund is designed to operate for five years, offering a mechanism that retains the potential for Bitcoin price appreciation while providing 1:1 downside protection through a gold linkage.

Cantor Fitzgerald Chairman Brandon Lutnick announced at the Bitcoin 2025 conference that the product aims to attract traditional investors who are cautious about Bitcoin into the crypto ecosystem. The institution has previously engaged in Bitcoin lending activities, with initial partners including crypto lending platform Maple and brokerage FalconX.

data.title: Placeholder Partner: The current market correction does not mean the end of the market, and the risk structure remains good
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Placeholder partner Chris Burniske posted on the X platform, "Don't mistake a small pullback for the end of the market. The overall risk/reward structure is still good."

data.title: Webus International Explores $300 Million Financing Strategy for Global Payment Solutions
data.description: According to Odaily, Webus International Limited, a mobile travel service provider, is exploring a financing strategy of up to $300 million to establish an XRP reserve fund. This initiative aims to support its global payment solutions through diversified non-equity financing tools. The strategy may involve utilizing available cash reserves, bank loans, shareholder guarantees, and third-party institutional credit support from traditional banks. By adopting these non-dilutive financing methods, the company seeks to maintain capital flexibility, support long-term growth, and protect shareholder value while advancing its digital asset and cross-border payment strategic goals.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Daly Considers Two Rate Cuts This Year Amid Economic Conditions
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Daly stated that if the labor market remains robust and inflation decreases, it would be reasonable to implement two rate cuts this year. However, she noted that the range of potential risks remains significant.

data.title: HLP made $530,000 profit from liquidating James Wynn's $100 million position
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin’s monitoring, Hyperliquidity Provider (HLP) made a profit of $530,000 by liquidating James Wynn’s $100 million position.

data.title: SEC Clarifies Stance on PoS Activities and Securities Trading
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has clarified that certain Proof of Stake (PoS) activities do not constitute securities trading. This follows a previous statement from the SEC regarding its position on Proof of Work (PoW) mining activities, indicating that these do not involve offers and sales of securities.

The SEC has stated that participants in mining activities are not required to register transactions with the commission under the Securities Act. Furthermore, these activities do not fall within the registration exemptions outlined by the Securities Act related to mining activities.

data.title: Kyrgyzstan Unveils Gold-Backed Stablecoin USDKG Details
data.description:
According to PANews, the Kyrgyzstan Ministry of Finance has announced the details of its gold-backed stablecoin, USDKG, which will be strictly pegged to the physical gold reserves of the national treasury. Each USDKG token corresponds to a specific amount of gold, with reserves overseen by the Kyrgyz Republic's national depository and subject to regular audits to ensure transparency. The government aims to enhance financial inclusion and reduce transaction costs through blockchain technology while providing investors with a stable digital asset.

USDKG is expected to launch on blockchain platforms in the coming months, with ongoing collaboration with commercial banks and other institutions to facilitate system integration. The country hopes this gold-backed model will serve as a blueprint for digital economic innovation in Central Asia. Kyrgyzstan has been actively pursuing financial modernization reforms in recent years, ranking 58th globally in gold reserves in 2024, according to the World Gold Council.

Earlier reports indicated that Kyrgyzstan plans to introduce the USDKG stablecoin, backed by national gold reserves, in the third quarter.

data.title: U.S. Considers Temporary Tariff Increase to 15%
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the administration of U.S. President Donald Trump is contemplating a measure to implement tariffs as high as 15%. This policy would be effective for a duration of 150 days.
